<!--
This template auto-fills the description box when anyone opens a PR.
It nudges contributors (including you) to explain *why*, not just *what*.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. The "why" matters more than the "what". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / analysis
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / notebooks

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` is clean
- [ ] New logic has a test
- [ ] No data, secrets, or large files are committed
- [ ] Notebook outputs are stripped (if applicable)

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything you want a reviewer to look at closely, or context they'll need. -->
